mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game_pitcher_log ( game_id, team_side, pitch_order, player_name, appearance_label, result, season_w, season_l, season_s, innings_pitched_outs, batters_faced, pitches, at_bats_against, hits_against, home_runs_against, walks_hbp, strikeouts, runs_allowed, earned_runs, season_era ) VALUES ( #{gameId}, #{teamSide}, #{pitchOrder}, #{playerName}, #{appearanceLabel}, #{result}, #{seasonW}, #{seasonL}, #{seasonS}, #{inningsPitchedOuts}, #{battersFaced}, #{pitches}, #{atBatsAgainst}, #{hitsAgainst}, #{homeRunsAgainst}, #{walksHbp}, #{strikeouts}, #{runsAllowed}, #{earnedRuns}, #{seasonEra} )
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN gpl.team_side = 'AWAY' THEN g.home_team ELSE g.away_team END AS opponent, COUNT(DISTINCT gpl.game_id) AS games, COALESCE(SUM(gpl.innings_pitched_outs), 0) AS inningsOuts, COALESCE(SUM(gpl.earned_runs), 0) AS earnedRuns, COALESCE(SUM(gpl.hits_against), 0) AS hitsAllowed, COALESCE(SUM(gpl.walks_hbp), 0) AS walksHbp, COALESCE(SUM(gpl.strikeouts), 0) AS strikeouts, ROUND(SUM(gpl.earned_runs) * 27.0 / NULLIF(SUM(gpl.innings_pitched_outs), 0), 2) AS era, ROUND((SUM(gpl.walks_hbp) + SUM(gpl.hits_against)) * 3.0 / NULLIF(SUM(gpl.innings_pitched_outs), 0), 2) AS whip FROM game_pitcher_log gpl JOIN game g ON g.id = gpl.game_id WHERE gpl.player_name = #{playerName} GROUP BY opponent ORDER BY era ASC

SELECT p.id AS player_id, COALESCE(SUM(pl.innings_pitched_outs), 0) AS total_innings_outs, COALESCE(SUM(pl.earned_runs), 0) AS total_earned_runs, COALESCE(SUM(pl.walks_hbp), 0) AS total_walks_hbp, COALESCE(SUM(pl.hits_against), 0) AS total_hits_against, COUNT(DISTINCT pl.game_id) AS game_count FROM player p JOIN game_pitcher_log pl ON pl.player_name = p.name JOIN game g ON g.id = pl.game_id AND ( (pl.team_side = 'AWAY' AND g.away_team = p.team) OR (pl.team_side = 'HOME' AND g.home_team = p.team) ) WHERE p.id = #{playerId} GROUP BY p.id
